overall.description: A cinematic walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, starting from a covered walkway with neon overhead lights and transitioning to an open commercial plaza with digital billboards. The scene features wet reflective pavement, pedestrians with umbrellas, and vibrant neon lighting throughout, characteristic of Night City from Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with orange seating benches

events.description: camera stands up from bench and begins walking forward along the walkway

agents.ego_description: initially sitting and observing other characters on the benches, then stands and begins walking

notable_agents.action: three characters sitting on bench, one smoking and two drinking beverages

entered.detail: bright orange modern public seating with illuminated edges
tall palm trees growing behind the seating area
raised concrete wall with integrated planters and greenery
large spiral neon light installation with purple and blue hues

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a covered pedestrian walkway at night, with characters sitting on orange benches beneath palm trees. The camera observes a group of three NPCs relaxing and smoking before standing up and beginning to walk forward along the wet concrete path, with vibrant neon spiral lights visible overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway adjacent to busy road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking with a glowing purple umbrella

entered.detail: tall dark concrete wall with decorative gold trim
metal mesh fence separating walkway from adjacent road with traffic
rain-slicked concrete reflecting neon lights in rainbow patterns

segments.scene_description: The camera walks along a narrow covered walkway illuminated by an overhead spiral of neon lights. The wet pavement reflects vibrant colors, while a concrete wall and metal fence run along the right side separating the path from a road with sparse traffic. Pedestrians with umbrellas occasionally pass by in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial plaza with digital advertising

events.description: exits covered walkway into open urban plaza with large digital billboards

agents.ego_description: walking into the open plaza area, navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian carrying a large glowing neon umbrella

entered.detail: tall building facade covered with multiple digital advertisement screens
teal-colored escalator entrance with illuminated edges
digital advertising stand with rotating holographic display
illuminated sign for El Guapo with stylized graphics

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the covered walkway into an open commercial plaza dominated by massive digital billboards on building facades. The space features a green escalator structure on the left and various advertisement kiosks. More pedestrians are visible, some carrying illuminated umbrellas, as the environment transitions from enclosed to open with mixed lighting from both neon and building advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy commercial plaza with multiple pedestrian routes

agents.ego_description: walking through the crowded plaza following a group of pedestrians ahead

notable_agents.action: group of three pedestrians walking ahead, one with studded leather jacket

entered.detail: tall commercial building with multiple levels of illuminated advertising displays
tall digital screen showing animated advertisements

segments.scene_description: The camera continues through the bustling open plaza, following a group of pedestrians past large vertical billboards and multi-story buildings covered in digital screens. The wet pavement continues to reflect the mixed neon and commercial lighting, with moderate crowds moving in the same direction through the commercial district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered pedestrian walkway into a vast, neon-drenched commercial plaza. It begins beside orange benches and palm trees, observing a group of people smoking before moving forward along a wet concrete path beneath a spiral of vibrant overhead neon lights. As the camera advances, the view is framed by a concrete wall and metal fence on the right, passing pedestrians with umbrellas who reflect the colorful glow of the pavement. The scene then opens as the camera emerges from the enclosure into a wide plaza dominated by massive digital billboards and a green escalator structure. Finally, the movement continues through the bustling district, gliding past multi-story buildings covered in digital screens and moderate crowds under a canopy of mixed commercial lighting.
